scripts.install:all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others "npm run start:ml" "npm run start:server" "npm run start:client"
scripts.start:ml: cd ml-service && source venv310/bin/activate && uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001 --reload
